name: Greater Valley
description_short: Greater Valley Health Center is a Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC) in Kalispell, MT offering primary medical, dental, and behavioral health services with sliding-scale fees based on income.
description_long:
Greater Valley Health Center (GVHC) has served the Flathead Valley community since 2007 as a Federally Qualified Health Center. The organization is a non-profit healthcare provider with federal Public Health Service deemed status, operating multiple clinic locations across Kalispell and Evergreen, Montana. GVHC operates under a mission to provide comprehensive, patient-centered integrated care regardless of patients' ability to pay.

GVHC offers three primary service lines: primary medical care including wellness visits, acute care, chronic disease management, and preventative services; comprehensive dental care covering preventative, restorative, and urgent needs; and behavioral health services including integrated therapy, outpatient addiction treatment, and school-based therapy. The center also provides case management through Care Navigators who help patients and families navigate healthcare and social systems. Services are available across five physical locations in the Kalispell area, with some locations operating on limited schedules.

GVHC's distinguishing feature is its sliding-fee discount structure based on family size and income, ensuring that no services are denied due to inability to pay. As an FQHC, the organization receives Health and Human Services funding and operates under federal oversight. The integrated care model combines primary medical, dental, and behavioral health in a coordinated approach rather than treating these as separate services.

GVHC is fundamentally a healthcare provider, not a consumer finance company. While the sliding-scale fee model assists low-income patients financially, this is healthcare delivery, not credit or lending services. The organization is appropriate for uninsured or underinsured individuals seeking affordable healthcare in Montana, but does not offer financial products, credit building, loans, or debt relief services typical of consumer finance platforms.
services: Primary medical care and wellness visits
Acute care and urgent medical needs
Sliding-scale fee discounts based on income and family size
pros: Sliding-scale fees based on family size and income ensure affordability regardless of insurance status
Federally Qualified Health Center status provides oversight and access to federal funding
Integrated services (medical, dental, behavioral health) available at multiple locations
Care Navigator case management helps patients navigate healthcare and social systems
School-based therapy locations increase accessibility for families with children
Serves the underserved Flathead Valley community since 2007 with established track record
Comprehensive behavioral health services including addiction treatment
cons: Limited to Kalispell and Evergreen, Montana area—not accessible to patients outside this region
Some clinic locations operate on limited schedules (e.g., Monday/Thursday or Tuesday/Thursday only)
Not a consumer finance provider; does not offer loans, credit building, or debt relief services
No online lending or same-day funding options for financial emergencies
Website does not detail specific sliding-scale fee amounts or income thresholds
best_for: Uninsured or underinsured families in the Flathead Valley seeking affordable healthcare
Patients requiring integrated primary medical, dental, and behavioral health services
Low-income individuals and families who qualify for sliding-scale fee discounts
People seeking addiction treatment or mental health services in rural Montana
diagnosis: Greater Valley Health Center is a Federally Qualified Health Center providing affordable healthcare services, not a consumer finance provider. It is best for uninsured/underinsured residents of the Flathead Valley seeking sliding-scale medical, dental, or behavioral health care. The critical caveat is that GVHC offers no financial products, lending services, credit building tools, or debt relief—it is a healthcare organization miscategorized on a consumer finance platform.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
